impact: The daemon was correctly failing because the process index referenced a nonexistent inspection skeleton fixture. Replacing that single JSON fixture with the committed inspection scheduling/result follow-up skeleton path gives the next cycle a clean fixture baseline before adding any validator code, keeping recovery narrow and deterministic.
summary: Repair the lifecycle process index fixture so checkbox-29 can proceed past the known missing inspection skeleton path failure.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 6 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
